This is one of my favorite features of the city and I take all of my visitors here.  We start at the top of Telegraph Hill and walk slowly down to Levi's Plaza by the Bay.  Along the way we find quirky architecture and apartments and wonder how people live here and get their groceries up the steps.
Filbert Steps lead up (or down) from Coit Tower. Nice houses and apartments on both sides of the steps. Must be tricky to get heavy goods in and out of the houses. 🏘️
